dialogos.texto_en: ...Whew.\nAll the reports I have to submit are completed.
Alright, I have the day off from my part-time job\nas well, so maybe I can make progress\non other things too!
Okaaay!
(It's unusual for my doorbell to ring.)
(I don't have any friends who would come over\n without permission, and well, a money delivery from\n home... Nah, couldn't be that.)
(Ah, oh no!\n Could it be some strange solicitation?)
(Darn it.\n I already responded,\n so I can't pretend I'm not home now, can I?)
Hellooo? You stiiill aren't ready?
...Huh?\nThat voice just now?!
UWAAA?!
Futaro-kun!\nHere I am!
D-don't just say 'here I am!'\nNormally, you'd give a heads-up, right?!
And, don't just suddenly hug me!
Yeah yeah, I get it, I get it.\nI can see through everything, you know.
...Huh?
You were longing for human warmth living alone, right?\nNo need to be embarrassed about it, okay?
I-I'm not embarrassed!\nI'm just surprised!
That's something to be happy about, right?\nAfter all, your girlfriend came to visit.
Or, perhaps?\nIs there a problem that I came without notice?
If I wasn't home, it would be more troublesome for you,\nwouldn't it?\nSo, please tell me when you plan to come over.
Well then, I'll do that for the next time.
*sigh*\nAnyway, don't just cling to me forever.\nCome inside.
Can't be helped, I guess.\nWell then, paaardon me.
Why does it feel like I'm the bad one here...?
If I knew you were coming,\nI would have prepared something to eat, or whatever.
Don't worry about that.\nIt was actually sudden for me too.
Is it related to work, by any chance?
Yeah.\nI came here to film a drama.
There was a sudden schedule change today,\nso I had a little bit of free time.\nI thought, maybe I could see you.
Well, I figured it might be something like that.
Wh-what?
You were a bit disappointed now, weren't you?
N-not really?\nYou also seem to be busy with work, \nwhich is a good thing, isn't it? Hahahaha!
You're not being honest.\n'Oh, she's just here for work, huh?'\nIt's written all over your face.
Eeerh...
Ahaha!\nYou're still so transparent, aren't you?
So, what's next? Do you have more work after this?
You guessed right.\nI AM a popular actress, you know.
After this, I have a meeting with the directors,\nthen we'll be filming in the studio in the evening.\nFinally, we'll go outside for a night scene.
Wow, you're working until late. You're way too busy.
Hmm... The shot is just a kiss scene with a \ncity view background at night, so if we get \nit done quickly, it shouldn't be too late, I guess.
...Wow.
(A kiss scene, huh? Before, she used to say things like,\n 'I think it's a bad take.'\n But she's no longer a student, now that she's graduated.)
(Ichika is also a professional actress,\n so things like that...)
You're wearing all your thoughts\non your face again, you know?
HUH?!
You can relax. Another girl is my partner.
Remember?\nWe talked about the drama during the school festival.
That drama received good reviews, thanks to you.\nNow, we're filming its sequel.
I-is that so?\nI had nooo idea.
It's been advertised on TV and in magazines, you know.
I thought you would at least check the work I'm in.\nAs always, you're clueless\nwhen it comes to that kind of stuff.
As you can see, there's no TV in this room.\nIt would be nice if you told me about it, though,\nya know?
Alright, then I'll tell you something good.
You're the only boy who has ever touched me here.
R-really... Is that so...
What are you gonna do?\nBefore anyone else touches me,\ndo you want to feel me more?
Ichika...\nYou have work right after this, don't you?
Oh my, it's already this late?\nI have to hurry or I'll be late for the meeting!
Sorry, I couldn't spend much time with you.
Don't worry about it.\n...I'm happy to see you after such a long time.
Come on...\nIt's not fair for you\nto suddenly be honest like that.
I-it's fine.\nThere's no need to hide it...
Look!\nYou can't be late, right?\nHurry up and go to work!
Yeah, yeah.\nWell then, sorry for intruding.
Yeah, do your best!
Oh, by the way!
What, did you forget something?
Someday, instead of saying 'pardon me'\nor 'sorry for intruding'%p-2;――
Let's learn to say 'I'm home'\nand 'I'm leaving' instead.
...Eh?\nYou mean...
Yeah, that's what I mean.\nWell then, I'll do my best at work!
